title: HCSL Chief Project Engineer Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
short_info: Hooghly Cochin Shipyard Limited (HCSL) has released the official Chief Project Engineer Notification 2026 on 20 May 2026 at Hooghly Cochin Shipyard Limited (HCSL). A total of 1 vacancy has been announced under the HCSL Chief Project Engineer Recruitment 2026. Eligible candidates aged up to 65 years with a qualification of Degree in Civil/ Mechanical/ Electrical Engineering from a recognized University with 60% marks can apply through Email mode from 20 May 2026 to 09 June 2026. The official notification PDF and application details are available below.

qualification.education_qualification: Degree in Civil/ Mechanical/ Electrical Engineering from a recognized University with 60% marks. Master's degree in relevant field or MBA from a recognized Institute (Desirable).
qualification.details: Qualification: Degree in Civil/ Mechanical/ Electrical Engineering from a recognized University with 60% marks. Desirable: Master's degree in relevant field or MBA from a recognized Institute.

vacancy_details.Post Name: Chief Project Engineer on contract basis

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for HCSL Chief Project Engineer Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 09-06-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the HCSL Chief Project Engineer (CPE) post?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email for the HCSL Chief Project Engineer (CPE) position is 09 June 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the salary offered for the Chief Project Engineer (CPE) role?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the Chief Project Engineer (CPE) post will receive a monthly salary of Rs. 1,65,000/-.

faq.question: Q3. What are the educational qualifications required for this recruitment?
faq.answer: A Degree in Civil/ Mechanical/ Electrical Engineering with 60% marks is mandatory. A Master's degree or MBA is desirable.

faq.question: Q4. What is the maximum age limit for the Chief Project Engineer (CPE) position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Chief Project Engineer (CPE) post is 65 years.

faq.question: Q5. How can candidates apply for this HCSL recruitment?
faq.answer: Interested candidates need to apply by sending their complete application via email before the last date.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category in this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q7. What is the total number of vacancies released by HCSL?
faq.answer: Hooghly Cochin Shipyard Limited has announced a total of 1 vacancy for the Chief Project Engineer (CPE) post.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for the Chief Project Engineer (CPE) role?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Chief Project Engineer (CPE) position will be based on a Personal Interview.

faq.question: Q9. What is the advertisement number for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The advertisement number for this HCSL recruitment is HCSL/HR/RECTT/CONT/2026-27/1.

faq.question: Q10. What is the job type for the Chief Project Engineer (CPE) position?
faq.answer: The Chief Project Engineer (CPE) position is a contractual role.
